name: @intentsolutionsio/integration-test-runner
description: Run and manage integration test suites with environment setup, database seeding, and cleanup

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install integration-test-runner\\n  or /plugin install integration-test-runner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
